creator: dufresnep@zoho.com
text:
Was to report this but you are confirming.

Error while fetching file:///mnt/usr/freebsd-dist/base.txz: No such file or dir
/mnt/usr/freebsd-dist directory have only the MANIFEST file that show that have
inside it mandatory on base.txz mentioned, but the file itself not in the dir.

was using:
https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/ISO-IMAGES/13.1/FreeBSD-13.1-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso

I believe I have seen the same with 13.2 BETA3 this morning.
